Discord
FAQs
What Makes CTI Different?
START NOW

City Traders Imperium is a prop firm funding traders since 2018, and Unlike prop firms that use equity-based drawdown, CTI uses balance-based drawdown – meaning your drawdown limit is calculated from your account balance, not your peak equity, so a winning trade never reduces how much room you have to trade.

This gives traders a clear, consistent drawdown limit from day one. No shifting rules. No surprise violations. You always know exactly where you stand. CTI offers three challenge formats: 1-Step, 2-Step, and Instant Funding, available on MT5 and Match Trader platforms. Traders can choose the structure that fits their style and experience level.

CTI offers up to 100% profit share, no time limits on challenges, and funded accounts that scale to $4M. Every program includes CTI Academy free, and a free trial account is available with no purchase required.

Founded in 2018, City Traders Imperium is one of the longest-running forex prop firms currently operating.
Two Powerful Platforms. One Prop Firm.

Whether you prefer MT5 or Match-Trader, CTI gives you the freedom to trade your edge.

Ultra-Fast Execution & Low Latency.
Available on Desktop, Web, and Mobile.
START NOW
The Prop Firm That Equips You To Win

Everything you need to succeed is built into your account, with no additional fees or upgrades.

Account Metrix.
Account Analysis.
Trading Journal.
Risk Calculators.
Economic Calendar.
Personal Wallet.
Direct Payouts.
Affiliate Portal.
START NOW
Education Meets Funding
At No Extra Cost

Get full access to all CTI Academy courses and educational content, completely free, when you purchase any funded account.

From beginner to funded trader. Everything you need is included.

LEARN MORE

From mindset to method—our newest articles give you the edge.

Contact Us
Terms & Conditions
Refund Policy
Conduct Policy
Privacy Policy
AML Policy
Affiliate Agreement
Sitemap

© 2025 Copyright City Traders Imperium. All Rights Reserved.

Beware of impersonators: This is our only official website. Always verify that the URL is https://www.citytradersimperium.com.

All Educational Services, courses, mentoring, and training are provided by CTI FZCO with company number DSO-FZCO-21340 and registered address Dubai Silicon Oasis, DDP, Building A1, Dubai, United Arab Emirates.

CTI FZCO/City Traders Imperium does not undertake any regulated activities, does not act as, or provide services as, a broker, is not a financial institution of any kind, does not ‎market any brokerage services, and does not act as, or provide services as, a custodian. The purchase of programs should not be considered a deposit. All fees are used for operational costs, including but not limited to staff, technology, and other business-related expenses. 

The trading platforms and simulated demo trading services are provided by City Traders Imperium limited, a company incorporated and registered under the laws of Comoros Union, with company number 15969 (License Number L15969/CTI) and a registered address at Hamchako, Mutsamudu, The Autonomous Islan of Anjouan, Union of Comoros and management office at Algaroud Center, 2nd Floor, Office 101-05, Algaroud, Dubai, UAE. All City Traders Imperium 3rd-party partner clearing firms conduct regulated activities and are authorised to do so by their respective regulatory authority.

Tech provided by PropFintech.com • Address: RM 409, Beverley Comm Ctr, 87–105 Chatham Rd South, Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong.

Non-Targeted Reach

Information on this site is not directed to residents of certain countries, such as Iran, Syria, Cuba, and North Korea (Democratic People’s Republic of Korea), the Russian Federation or a country where such distribution or use would be contrary to local law or regulation. When accessing this website from a country in which its use may or may not be prohibited, it is the user’s responsibility to ensure that any use of the website or services adheres to their local laws or regulations. City Traders Imperium does not affirm that the information on its website is suitable for all jurisdictions.

Disclaimer

All information provided on this site is intended solely for educational purposes related to trading in a simulated demo environment and does not serve in any way as a specific investment recommendation, investment opportunity, or similar general recommendation regarding the trading of investment instruments.

The Services provided on this website are “Professional Skill-Assessment” Services. The outcome of the proposed services is necessarily determined by the individual’s skill level and ability to perform under the program guidelines and objectives as specified for each service separately. Nothing on the Website or in our Services represents a solicitation, advice, endorsement, or offer to purchase or sell stocks or other financial instruments by City Traders Imperium, its agents, employees, contractors, or any connected entities.

All accounts operate within a simulated demo trading environment. These platforms do not mirror real trading in the financial markets or engage with real money or assets. Any results experienced within this simulated demo trading context do not translate to actual financial gains or losses and cannot be claimed or actualized beyond this educational context. Participation in a simulated or funded trading program does not guarantee future results. All trading involves risk, and past performance does not indicate future results. Only trade with capital you can afford to lose. Please read our full Terms and Conditions before participating.
